---
title: "Understanding Resolution Policies"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Understanding Resolution Policies}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

Smaller meter values are finer native source resolution. `resolution` filters
NOAA source tiles; it does not resample output cells.

```{r, eval=FALSE}
bluertopo(aoi, resolution = "finest")
bluertopo(aoi, resolution = bluertopo_resolution("between", min_m = 4, max_m = 16))
```
